text:
If a hot face is familiar, this shame pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Name the actual event out loud in one sentence, set it apart from your worth in a second sentence. And choose one honest next step. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. The mistake is information about a moment, not a verdict on who you are.

acceptance_layer: system working — Metricool dry-run only (not live publish)
